name: function 80

template:
INSERT INTO `sitedata`.`trend`
(
`DateTime`,
`Total 1`,
`Super A`,
`Super B`,
`Fines`,
`Grits`,
`Chop`,
`Total 2`,
`Mixback`,
`Screenings`)
VALUES
(
'{{payload}}',
{{ext.Total 1 }},
{{ext.Super A }},
{{ext.Super B }},
{{ext.Fines }},
{{ext.Grids }},
{{ext.Chop }},
{{ext.Total 2 }},
{{ext.Mixback }},
{{ext.Screenings }});

name: Seed Rate
func:
var values = msg.payload

var E1 = global.get("SCALE_1_CUR") || 0
var F1 =  values[0].hopper

var E2 = global.get("SCALE_2_CUR") || 0
var F2 = values[1].hopper

var E3 = global.get("SCALE_3_CUR") || 0
var F3 = values[2].hopper

var E4 = global.get("SCALE_4_CUR") || 0
var F4 = values[3].hopper

var E5 = global.get("SCALE_5_CUR") || 0
var F5 = values[4].hopper

var E6 = global.get("SCALE_6_CUR") || 0
var F6 = values[5].hopper

var E7 = global.get("SCALE_7_CUR") || 0
var F7 = values[6].hopper

var E8 = global.get("SCALE_8_CUR") || 0
var F8 = values[7].hopper

//Extractions Month

var total_month = (F2 + F3 + F4 + F5) ;
var total_shift = (E2 + E3 + E4 + E5) 

var H2 = (F2 / total_month) * 100 || 0
var I2 = (E2 / total_shift) * 100 || 0

var H3 = (F3 / total_month) * 100 || 0
var I3 = (E3 / total_shift) * 100 || 0

var H4 = (F4 / total_month) * 100 || 0
var I4 = (E4 / total_shift) * 100 || 0

var H5 = (F5 / total_month) * 100 || 0
var I5 = (E5 / total_shift) * 100 || 0

name: function 342

template:
SELECT
  shift,
  SUM(`Transfer`) AS Transfer,
  SUM(`Intake A`) AS `Intake A`,
  SUM(`Intake B`) AS `Intake B`,
  SUM(`Super A`) AS `Super A`,
  SUM(`Super B`) AS `Super B`,
  SUM(`Fines`) AS `Fines`,
  SUM(`Chop`) AS `Chop`,
  SUM(`Grits`) AS `Grits`,
  SUM(`Mixback`) AS `Mixback`,
  SUM(`First Break A`) AS `First Break A`,
  SUM(`First Break B`) AS `First Break B`,
  SUM(`Screenings`) AS `Screenings`,
  SUM(`Total 1`) AS `Total 1`,
  AVG(`Super A Ext`) AS `Super A Ext`,
  AVG(`Super B Ext`) AS `Super B Ext`,
  AVG(`Fines Ext`) AS `Fines Ext`,
  AVG(`Grits Ext`) AS `Grits Ext`,
  AVG(`Chop Ext`) AS `Chop Ext`,
  SUM(`Total 2`) AS `Total 2`,
  AVG(`Mixback Ext`) AS `Mixback Ext`,
  AVG(`Screenings Ext`) AS `Screenings Ext`
FROM `shifts`
WHERE `Start Time` BETWEEN
  STR_TO_DATE('{{payload.Date01}}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
  AND STR_TO_DATE('{{payload.Date02}}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
GROUP BY shift
Order BY Shift ASC

name: function 60

template:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scale_readings (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  total REAL DEFAULT 0,
  hopper REAL DEFAULT 0,
  rate REAL DEFAULT 0,
  coms INT DEFAULT 0,
  time_val DATETIME DEFAULT null
);
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO scale_readings (id) VALUES ({{payload}});
select * from scale_readings order by id ASC
